description: Harvest online: All players should see their harvest turn (even just to acknowledge receiving the base coin that everyone gets). Currently only players with province rewards go through the harvest popup sequence. We need to ensure every player gets a turn in the harvest flow to see the base +1 coin popup.
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, in the executeHarvest function (around line 1016): After giving all players +1 coin, modify the harvestPlayerRewards and flow setup. Currently, the harvest popup interactive flow is only set up if there are province-specific rewards. Change this: The harvest resolution should include ALL players in the turnOrder, even those with no province rewards. Each player should have at least an entry indicating they received the base coin. The simplest approach: change the harvestResolutionOrder to include all players (in turnOrder), and track which players have province rewards vs just the base coin. Set harvestCurrentPlayerId to the first player in turnOrder.

In src/types/game.ts, consider whether we need to add a new field to distinguish 'base coin only' players in the harvest flow. The simplest approach is to always set harvestMandateActive = true and create the harvestResolutionOrder with all players in turnOrder. The existing harvestPlayerRewards can remain as-is (only province rewards), but the advancement logic needs to iterate through all players, not just those with province rewards.

Actually, the clearest approach: Add a new field 'harvestAllPlayersOrder: string[]' to GameState that lists ALL player IDs in turn order. The harvestCurrentPlayerId will cycle through this array. For each player: first they see the base coin popup (already handled by the coinConfirmedForPlayer logic in HarvestPopup.tsx), then they see their province rewards if any, then we advance to the next player. Alternatively and simpler: ensure that harvestResolutionOrder includes all players (not just those with province rewards). The HarvestPopup already shows the coin popup before province rewards. We just need the server to cycle through ALL players.

SIMPLEST APPROACH: In gameLogic.ts executeHarvest, ALWAYS set harvestMandateActive = true (even when harvestPlayerRewards is empty). Set harvestResolutionOrder to include ALL player IDs from turnOrder. Set harvestCurrentPlayerId to turnOrder[0]. In the advanceHarvestResolution function, change the logic: instead of iterating through harvestPlayerRewards entries, iterate through a separate player list. Each player gets their coin popup shown, then their province rewards (if any). When all province rewards for that player are shown, advance to the next player. When all players have been cycled, end harvest.

IMPLEMENTATION DETAIL: Add a new field to GameState: 'harvestAcknowledgedPlayers: string[]' (array of player IDs who have acknowledged the base coin). The flow per player: (1) player becomes harvestCurrentPlayerId, (2) client shows base coin popup, (3) player clicks accept -> sends ACKNOWLEDGE_HARVEST, (4) server checks: if this player has province rewards remaining, show them one by one, (5) when all province rewards for this player are done, move to next player in turnOrder, (6) when all players done, end harvest.
In src/types/game.ts: Add 'harvestAcknowledgedPlayers: string[]' to the GameState interface.

In src/utils/gameLogic.ts: In createInitialGameState (around line 250-260 where other harvest fields are initialized), add harvestAcknowledgedPlayers: []. In executeHarvest: ALWAYS set harvestMandateActive = true, set harvestCurrentPlayerId to turnOrder[0], set harvestAcknowledgedPlayers to []. Keep harvestPlayerRewards as province-only rewards. Set harvestPopupVisible = true. In advanceHarvestResolution: Check if the current player has already been acknowledged for the base coin (is in harvestAcknowledgedPlayers). If NOT: add them and check if they have province rewards. If they DO have province rewards, show the first one (set harvestResolutionIndex to point to their first reward). If they DON'T have province rewards, advance to the next player in turnOrder. If they ARE already acknowledged: advance the harvestResolutionIndex for their province rewards. When their rewards are done, advance to the next player in turnOrder. When all players in turnOrder have been processed, clear harvest state.

In src/components/HarvestPopup.tsx: The current logic already shows a coin popup before province rewards per player. The key change: in online mode, the waiting/active determination should use the new harvestCurrentPlayerId (which now cycles through ALL players). The coinConfirmedForPlayer local state tracks whether the current player's coin popup was dismissed locally. When a player dismisses the coin popup locally, they send ACKNOWLEDGE_HARVEST to the server. The server then either shows province rewards or advances to next player. Remove the local-only coinConfirmedForPlayer tracking - instead, have the coin confirmation also go to the server.
In src/server/index.ts: The ACKNOWLEDGE_HARVEST handler already validates harvestCurrentPlayerId. No major changes needed, just ensure it calls the updated advanceHarvestResolution.
acceptance_criteria: In online mode, every player in the game gets their turn in the harvest popup sequence
Each player sees at minimum the base +1 coin popup and must acknowledge it before the flow proceeds to the next player
Players with province rewards still see their province reward popups after acknowledging the coin
Players without province rewards acknowledge the coin and then the flow advances to the next player
Other players see the 'Waiting for X' message while it's not their turn
Hotseat mode continues to work as before (no regressions)
verification: Run npm run build and confirm it passes with no TypeScript or build errors
findings: Added harvestAllPlayersOrder and harvestCoinAcknowledged to GameState. In online mode, executeHarvest now always sets harvestMandateActive=true and cycles through ALL players in turnOrder. advanceHarvestResolution uses a two-phase approach per player: first coin acknowledgment (harvestCoinAcknowledged=false->true), then province rewards if any. HarvestPopup uses server-driven harvestCoinAcknowledged for online mode (sends ACKNOWLEDGE_HARVEST on coin accept), keeps local state for hotseat. Hotseat mode unchanged since harvestAllPlayersOrder stays empty. Build passes cleanly.
